body:
Hey Lena,

Just wanted to follow up and see if you'd had a chance to look over the deck from [Solaris Grid](startups/solaris-grid) — their approach to distributed energy storage at the grid edge is unlike anything else I've seen at seed stage this cycle, and I think there's a real co-investment angle here for [Initialized](funds/initialized) given your infrastructure thesis. I've been doing diligence on the team for about six weeks now and the technical depth is genuinely impressive, particularly on the firmware side. Would love to sync this week if you have thirty minutes — I'm thinking a shared lead structure could work well given the round size, and I'd rather move with someone I trust than bring in a firm we don't know. Let me know what your calendar looks like.

Best,
Amara
